script: |
  $intServicesPath = Join-Path "$(Build.SourcesDirectory)" "src\WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices"

  Write-Host "IntServices path:"
  Write-Host $intServicesPath
  Write-Host (Test-Path $intServicesPath)

  Write-Host ""
  Write-Host "Child items under IntServices:"
  Get-ChildItem -Path $intServicesPath -Force | Select-Object Name, FullName

  $functionsDir = Get-ChildItem -Path $intServicesPath -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -like "*AzureFunctions*" } | Select-Object -First 1

  if (-not $functionsDir) {
    throw "AzureFunctions directory not found under IntServices."
  }

  Write-Host ""
  Write-Host "Resolved AzureFunctions dir:"
  Write-Host $functionsDir.FullName

  $functionsProj = Get-ChildItem -Path $functionsDir.FullName -Filter "*.csproj" | Select-Object -First 1

  if (-not $functionsProj) {
    throw "AzureFunctions csproj not found inside resolved AzureFunctions directory."
  }

  Write-Host ""
  Write-Host "Resolved AzureFunctions csproj:"
  Write-Host $functionsProj.FullName

  dotnet publish $functionsProj.FullName `
    --configuration ${{ parameters.buildConfiguration }} `
    --framework net8.0 `
    --output "$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)"
